description_long: This military-style SUV features a boxy, utilitarian design with a matte olive green exterior and prominent white markings, including a cross and 'US NAVY' text on the hood. The vehicle has an open cabin with two camouflage-patterned seats, a simple dashboard, and a large, thin steering wheel. The windshield is upright and framed in metal, while the rear holds a spare tire mounted externally. The wheels are rugged, with visible bolts and a greenish hue matching the body. The SUV's body panels are flat and angular, with minimal ornamentation, and a white star is painted on the rear side panel. The overall appearance suggests a vintage military jeep, likely from the World War II era, designed for off-road and utility use.
description: A vintage military-style SUV with a matte olive green body, white markings, open cabin, and rugged wheels. Features include camouflage seats, a spare rear tire, and utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the upright windshield, two camouflage seats, and the white cross on the hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the open cabin, dashboard, steering wheel, and 'US NAVY' text on the hood.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the spare tire, rear panel, and the back of the seats.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the white star on the rear panel, open cabin, and the wheel design.
attribute_wheel_design: five-bolt steel wheels with a simple, solid pattern and green finish
